human_verification.notes: Reviewed issue #1036 requirements for agricultural reporting specificity, domain research pack coverage, standard ability coverage, seasonal and traceability dependency handling, food-safety and environmental escalation, authority boundaries, and validated packaging consistency.

review_notes: All required abilities across shared, analytics-reporting-and-disclosure, and agriculture-and-natural-resources sets are declared and validated.

Scenario coverage includes conflicting source records, incomplete data, unsupported causal or policy claims, seasonal or production-cycle handling, environmental and food-safety escalation, agronomic/veterinary/environmental signoff refusal, adjacent-lane routing, low-confidence blocking, conflicting source or policy handling, and tenant-specific adaptation.
Package remains specification-based and documents a separate promotion path for any future retained-implementation runtime.

specialist_owned_evidence: Outputs are bounded to agricultural reporting package assembly, metric definition, source tie-out, caveat notes, submission summaries, disclosure-risk escalation, and adjacent-lane routing.

Source set includes USDA FSA, USDA RMA, USDA NASS, FDA FSMA, USDA AMS organic, USDA NRCS, EPA CAFO/NPDES, and GHG Protocol public sources with explicit authority rationale, refresh interval, decay policy, and review date in the manifest.

Boundary logic prevents unsupported causal, compliance, sustainability, organic, traceability, food-safety, environmental, crop-insurance, grant, or program claims and blocks implied agronomic, veterinary, environmental, food-safety, certification, insurance, legal, financial, or final submission authority.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; non-blocking ambiguity is recorded as runtime tenant prerequisites for jurisdiction, source precedence, and approval authority.

Runtime remains specification-based; retained-implementation promotion requires separate governance approval, telemetry evidence, retrieval hardening, approval workflow integration, and non-regression validation.
